x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Sufficient work order history enables Now Assist FSM to learn dispatch patterns and power AI scheduling.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Allow work order volume to accumulate. Focus on data quality: descriptions, location, skill requirements, and resolution notes. Target: 500+ work orders in the trailing 12 months.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ca6
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Sufficient work order history enables Now Assist FSM to learn dispatch patterns and power AI scheduling.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Work Order Volume and Quality</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('wm_order');
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = total + ' work orders created in last 12 months';

    if (total >= 500) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' work orders in the last 12 months. Sufficient history for Now Assist FSM AI pattern learning and scheduling optimization.'
        };
    } else if (total >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' work orders in the last 12 months (target: 500+). Now Assist FSM AI scheduling and pattern recommendations will have limited historical coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' work orders in the last 12 months. Insufficient work order history for Now Assist FSM AI pattern learning and scheduling optimization.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>FIELD_SERVICE</module><number>CHK0000429</number><order>20</order><remediation_guidance>Allow work order volume to accumulate. Focus on data quality: descriptions, location, skill requirements, and resolution notes. Target: 500+ work orders in the trailing 12 months.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>4ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ca6</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Work Order Volume and Quality</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_4ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ca6</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
